approaches.title: Expand Around Center
approaches.summary: Iterate through each character and expand outward to find the longest palindromic substring centered at each position.

revisions.commitBody: too tired to know wtf is gg on
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation with flawed edge-case handling and redundant checks.
Fixed edge-case handling and simplified logic for even/odd length palindromes.
Further simplified by removing redundant checks and improving boundary conditions.
